title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed with any model served by Ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node & browsers (via proxy).

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models for chat, tools, embeddings, and retrieval.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, PDF, RAG, multimodal, admin panel).

title: ollama-cli (mxyng/ollama-cli)
summary: Interactive TUI for chatting with Ollama models written in Go.

title: ollama-copilot (github-copilot-ollama)
summary: Drop-in proxy that lets GitHub Copilot use any Ollama model as the backend.

title: ollama-helm (ollama-helm/ollama-helm)
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes.

title: ollama4j (ollama4j/ollama4j)
summary: Java/JVM client library for Ollama with Kotlin extensions and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rb (ollama-rb/ollama-rb)
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama: chat, generate, pull models with idiomatic Ruby.

title: ollama-chat (electron-ollama-chat)
summary: Lightweight Electron desktop chat client for Ollama.

title: ollama-coder (ollama-coder.nvim)
summary: Neovim plugin for inline code generation using Ollama models.

title: ollama-haystack (deepset-ai/haystack-ollama)
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-curl (tkr53/go-ollama-curl)
summary: Tiny Go package exposing Ollama REST calls with context and streaming.

title: ollama-discord (ollama-discord-bot)
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that chats using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-csharp (ollama-csharp/ollama-csharp)
summary: .NET client library for Ollama with async enumerable streaming.

title: ollama-rust (ollama-rust/ollama-rust)
summary: Rust crate providing typed APIs and streaming support for Ollama.

title: ollama-django (ollama-django)
summary: Django app + REST API wrapping Ollama for chat completions and embeddings.

title: ollama-slack (ollama-slack)
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama models into Slack channels.

title: ollama-obsidian (ollama-obsidian)
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts via Ollama inside notes.
